title: Imagiknight Industry
description: Imagiknight Industry is a vanilla+ content mod that aims to add more uses to underutilized materials and add some cool stuff.
body:
Imagiknight Industry is a vanilla+ content expansion focused on giving underutilized materials new and practical uses.
Current Features:

Heavy Workbench - A new crafting station that allows for the creation of more advanced components such as reinforced plates and gunpowder charges.

Dullum - A new ore found around the start  of the deepslate layer. It excells at producing cheap equipment in large quantaties and can also be used to create canned soups/stews to make them stackable.

Dullum Golem - A new golem made from dullum blocks, the dullum golem is a dimminiutive, low damage golem that can be commanded by a dullum controller.

Gatling Bow - A rapid fire portable redstone cannon that sacrifices range and accuracy for speed.

Safety Glass - Reinforced glass that takes longer to mine.

Potion Mines - Craftable land mines that explode into lingering potion clouds when powered.

Compatability:
This mod doesn't change any core minecraft mechanics or do anything that else that would interfere with most mods. Compatability patches for specific mods are in the works and will be released periodically.

I plan to keep this mod consistantly updated with new features and mechanics without taking away from the vanilla+ experience.

Report bugs and send feedback/suggestions to imagiknightorpheus@gmail.com
